Abdallah Dalvi  Social Media Manager | Digital Marketing Professional | Creative Team Lead
LinkedIn

Mumbai, India - Open to remote opportunities
 
Profile Summary
Digital  Marketing  Professional  with  3+  years  of  experience  creating
data-driven   campaigns   and   social   media   strategies   across
entertainment, finance, and e-commerce sectors. Proven success in
driving growth — achieving 1260%+ Instagram and 500%+ LinkedIn
increase, with over 300K+ new followers across platforms. Skilled in
managing creative and volunteer teams, designing visuals, and and
building campaigns that engage audiences with purpose. Proficient
in  Canva,  CapCut,  Clipchamp,  WordPress,  Meta  Business  Suite,
Hootsuite, Buffer, and SEMrush.
Education

HSC (12th Grade), Science Stream, Maharashtra State Board

Professional Experience
Digital Content Creator - Event Project, BarrierBreak
Sep 2025 – Nov 2025
• Led social media coverage for Inclusive India: Digital First 2025, 
featuring 55+ speakers and 475+ participants.
• Handled both event and product social media, creating educational 
LinkedIn content on accessibility and inclusion.
• Designed event visuals, slides, and on-screen banners used 
throughout sessions.
• Created promotional creatives for registrations, speaker updates, 
and live coverage.
• Captured and edited speaker bytes, highlights, and behind-the-
scenes clips.
• Managed a volunteer social media team, coordinating real-time 
updates during sessions.
Social Media Executive, Indian Television Dot Com
Feb 2024 – May 2025
• Developed and executed social media strategies, growing followers 
by 300k+ and significantly boosting engagement.
• Increased Instagram followers by 1261% (7.2k→98k), Facebook by 
425% (44k→231k), and LinkedIn by 500% (250→1.5k) within a year.
• Monetized Facebook and YouTube.
• Managed digital promotions for major events like Indian Audio 
Summit & Awards and Clef Music Awards 2024, featured in The Print.
Social Media & Digital Marketing, Internshala Internship
2022 – 2023
RentMAX – Stress Free Renting
• Redesigned the companyʼs WordPress website and led content 
strategy improvements.
• Achieved 32% Instagram growth in one month through targeted 
content and hashtags.
• Ran Meta ad campaigns, generating 50+ leads and boosting traffic 
within two weeks.
Motohom – Luxury Caravan Rentals
• Created multimedia content using Canva and VN Editor, growing 
Instagram by 300% (7.5k→30k) in a month.
• Managed a 30k+ follower community through active engagement 
and live sessions.
• Designed marketing materials that increased event sign-ups by 15%.
FurnDepot – Custom Furniture Brand
• Conducted competitor research and developed organic growth 
strategies.
• Increased Instagram followers by 99% (349→697) and Facebook by 
64% (703→1155) in 6 months.
• Set up a monthly analytics system via Meta Business Suite and 
Instrack to track engagement and conversions.
• Designed local print ads using Canva and Figma, leading to a 10% 
sales boost.
Social Media & Digital Marketing, Freelancing
2020 – 2022
Metalabs Agency
• Managed clients across industries like finance, esports, and e-
commerce.
• Led ad campaigns, optimizing creatives, budgets, and targeting for 
better conversions.
• Coordinated tasks via ClickUp, ensuring smooth client 
communication and timely delivery.
Gary Analyst
• Managed LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp 
communities, achieving 2000% LinkedIn and 1000% WhatsApp 
growth.
• Ran eBook and webinar campaigns focused on lead generation.
• Built and maintained gerrysonmehta.com and landing pages to 
improve conversions.
• Coordinated team projects using Jira for campaign execution.
